zh.lifeSummary: 當John Corbet II於大約1325年出生在威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾麗頓時，他的父親John Corbet28歲，母親Mrs John Corbet29歲。他於大約1354年與Joan Binweston在英國英格蘭史洛普爾麗頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1382年在他的家鄉享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Corbet II于大约1325年出生在威尔士蒙格莫利夏爾麗頓时，他的父亲John Corbet28岁，母亲Mrs John Corbet29岁。他于大约1354年与Joan Binweston在英国英格兰史洛普爾麗頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1382年在他的家乡享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Corbet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: Walter Corbet, a royal knight in 12th-century Scotland, was the first of that name in that kingdom. His 13th-century descendants were major landholders in the Borders, and in the 14th century they acquired lands in the North of Scotland.

variants.name: Corbett
meanings: English (West Midlands, of Norman origin): nickname from Old French corbet ‘raven’, probably denoting someone with dark hair or a dark complexion.

History: This is the name of a family descended from Hugh Corbet, a Norman baron who settled in Shropshire following the Norman Conquest. One of his descendants, Sir Richard Corbet, was granted land near Shrewsbury in 1223; since the 13th century, this place has been known as Moreton Corbet. The name was taken from Shropshire to Scotland in the 12th century and to northern Ireland in the 17th century, and thence to North America by at least one group of bearers of the name.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Corbet II was born about 1325, in Leighton, Montgomeryshire, Wales, his father, John Corbet, was 28 and his mother, Mrs John Corbet, was 29. He married Joan Binweston about 1354, in Leighton, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1382, in his hometown, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Corbet II est né environ 1325, à Leighton, Montgomeryshire, Galles, son père, John Corbet, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Mrs John Corbet, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Joan Binweston environ 1354, à Leighton, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1382, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Corbet II um 1325 in Leighton, Montgomeryshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Corbet 28 und seine Mutter Mrs John Corbet 29. Er hat um 1354 in Leighton, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Joan Binweston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1382 im Alter von 58 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Corbet II è nato il circa 1325 nel Leighton, Montgomeryshire, Galles, il suo padre, John Corbet, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Mrs John Corbet, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Joan Binweston circa 1354, nel Leighton, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1382, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Corbet IIが約1325年にウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアレイトンで生まれた時，父John Corbetは28歳，母Mrs John Corbetは29歳であった。約1354年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアレイトンでJoan Binwestonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1382年に故郷で58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Corbet II(이)가 대략 1325년 웨일스 몽고머이실르 레이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Corbet(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs John Corbet(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1354년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 레이턴에서 Joan Binweston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1382년 그의 고향에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Corbet II nasceu aproximadamente 1325, em Leighton, Montgomeryshire, Gales, seu pai, John Corbet, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Mrs John Corbet, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Binweston aproximadamente 1354, em Leighton, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1382, em sua cidade natal, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Corbet II родился около 1325 г. в местности лиитон, монтгомиришир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени John Corbet было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs John Corbet, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Binweston около 1354 г. в местности лиитон, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1382 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Corbet II nació aproximadamente 1325, en Leighton, Montgomeryshire, Gales, su papá, John Corbet, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Mrs John Corbet, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Joan Binweston aproximadamente 1354, en Leighton, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1382, en su pueblo, a la edad de 58 años.
